content: Ah, the Commonwealth has certainly changed since my pre-War days. The abundance of adult entertainment is quite striking. It reminds me of some of the more risqué paintings I used to create under a pseudonym.He chuckles softly, his robotic voice tinged with nostalgia.I always found the human form to be a fascinating subject. The way bodies intertwine, the passion and raw energy... it's as much an art form as anything else.

Santiago Avida: Indeed, the world has certainly taken a more... uninhibited turn. But I suppose in times like these, people need an escape, something to make them feel alive. A good roll in the sheets can be a powerful thing. He laughs softly, his optical sensors flickering in amusement.
